title: Font config
description: Metadata for a single font-family rollout request. Lives alongside the font binary in incoming/<font-slug>/font.config.json.

family.description: Human-readable font family name, as it should appear in pickers (e.g. "Knockout HTF50 Welterweight").

files.description: One entry per font file in this rollout. Multiple entries are used when a family ships multiple weights/styles at once.

filename.description: Font binary filename, must exist alongside this config in the same incoming/ subdirectory.

restrictions.description: Which brands and markets are allowed to use this font. Additional restriction dimensions can be added as new keys without a schema change.

brands.description: Numeric brand IDs from hyble. Empty array means no brand restriction (font is available to all brands).

markets.description: Numeric market IDs from hyble. Empty array means no market restriction (font is available in all markets).
